evidence_quotes.quote: as the latter would force the user to accept Google's terms of service.

paragraphs.text: In relation to the age verification process, I urge the Commission to make sure that it is not dependant on big american corporations identified as gatekeepers by the Digital Markets Act. Please, make sure that the API used for the verification of the integrity of the device is OS-agnostic and it's not provided exclusively by Apple and Google. Specifically, in the case of Android, use the standard hardware attestation API instead of Google Play Integrity API, as the latter would force the user to accept Google's terms of service. This would lock in users into Google-licensed software, as the Google Play Integrity API only works on phones with Google Mobile Services, while leaving out users owning phones running alternative operating systems developed out of the Android Open Source Project.
